overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt exploring a rural village at night. The character enters a wooden cabin, explores the interior, then exits and walks along a path to a riverside dock, crossing a wooden bridge and walking along the pier before turning around. The scene features atmospheric night lighting with warm interior lights contrasting against cool moonlit exteriors.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural cabin exterior with flowering trees

events.description: enters the wooden cabin transitioning from outdoor to indoor environment

agents.ego_description: walking toward the cabin and entering through the front door into the warm interior

entered.detail: rustic wooden log cabin with warm light glowing from doorway
tree with white blossoms beside the path
worn stone pathway leading to cabin entrance

segments.scene_description: Geralt approaches a rustic log cabin at night, walking along a stone path surrounded by grass and flowering trees. He enters the cabin through the open doorway, transitioning from the cool moonlit exterior to the warm interior space.

scene_state.functional_zone: cozy wooden cabin interior with fireplace

events.description: exits the cabin back to the outdoor night environment

agents.ego_description: walking around the cabin interior briefly before exiting through the front door

entered.detail: rough-hewn log walls with chinking between logs
stone fireplace with stacked firewood beside it
plank wooden flooring with warm lantern light

segments.scene_description: Inside the warmly lit cabin, Geralt moves across the wooden floor past a stone fireplace and stacked firewood. He quickly exits back into the cool night, leaving the cozy interior behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural path through grassy fields with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through open fields heading toward a distant bridge

entered.detail: worn dirt trail cutting through tall grass
simple wooden post and rail fence lining the path
dense dark forest silhouetted against night sky

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt path through open grassy fields, passing wooden fences with a dark forest in the background. The cabin recedes into the distance as he heads toward a wooden bridge visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden bridge and riverside dock with moored boats

events.description: encounters NPC fishermen on the dock near the boats

agents.ego_description: crossing the wooden bridge and walking along the dock past moored boats and fishermen

notable_agents.action: fisherman in red clothing standing near barrels on the dock

entered.detail: weathered wooden plank bridge over flowing water
dark flowing water with moonlight reflections
small building with straw roof on the dockside
wooden rowboats tied to the dock posts

segments.scene_description: Geralt crosses a weathered wooden bridge over dark flowing water, arriving at a dock area with a thatched-roof hut and moored boats. Torchlight illuminates the scene as he passes a fisherman in red clothing standing near barrels.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of wooden pier with boats moored alongside

events.description: reaches the end of the dock and turns around to walk back

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the dock, pausing briefly, then turning around to walk back toward the shore

entered.detail: terminus of the wooden pier with mooring posts and barrels

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, surrounded by water and moored boats, Geralt pauses briefly before turning around. He begins the walk back along the pier, with the wooden bridge now visible in the distance behind him.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moonlit rural exterior into a warm cabin interior, eventually leading out toward a riverside dock. It begins with Geralt walking along a stone path through flowering trees before entering a rustic log cabin, where the cool night air shifts into a cozy space lit by a stone fireplace. As he quickly exits the cabin, the scene opens back up into wide grassy fields and wooden fences, with the camera following him along a dirt path toward a distant bridge. The movement then carries him across a weathered wooden bridge over dark water and into a torch-lit dock area featuring a thatched-roof hut and moored boats. Finally, after passing a fisherman near several barrels, the camera reaches the end of the pier before turning around to face the bridge in the distance.
